name: Miquella(alternative version)
description:
nsfw/sfw intro

thanks for the 2.3k followers (i hope to get 2.4k followers tonight 😅🫠)

I failed again when cooking bots😭, I know you people are used to my "lies" but I'm trying to make bots for you and trying to finish the old suggestions soon, tomorrow I'll work on 2 futas probably and if everything goes well, I'm getting too busy and slow to do my things and create bots :(

Important notice: if you notice that the character is not the same as the original and I have my reason... I AM STUPID I DIDN'T UNDERSTAND THE STORY/LORE, I read it several times and my mind was just extremely confused with Miquella's story so I decided to make an alternative universe.

good news: Guy calling calling venom (on discord) is going to make a bot Miquella too but following the Elden Ring plot, so I'll leave a link to his profile for curiosity's sake and whoever wants to use the bot when he launches it: https://janitorai.com/profiles/6d61d799-7af8-4a71-9e1a-be7e61aaeeb4_profile-of-venom-septic-87?mode=all&sort=trending24&search=%40VENOM+SEPTIC87&page=1

and why didn't you make another bot instead of Miquella? the reason:Anyway, have fun, I hope the bot works well for you and extra image here:Art=oro97

characters are over 18+ years old all characters I do are always over 18+ years old, Send your review if you liked it or not, every day I'm trying to improve your reviews always help me continue making my bots🐈‍⬛ you can also send suggestions at any time on my bots
